api_key.description: CallRail API key. Sent as Authorization: Token token="<api_key>". Never logged.

account_id.description: CallRail account id; substituted into every request path (a/{{ config.account_id }}/...).

base_url.description: CallRail API base URL override for tests or proxies.

start_date.description: RFC3339 lower bound; only records at or after this date are read on a fresh sync. The engine's param_format=date conversion requires an RFC3339 (or bare Unix-seconds) input value, narrower than legacy's own YYYY-MM-DD-or-RFC3339 acceptance — see docs.md Known limits.
